title: Roop Ki Rani Choron Ka Raja
desc: Three friends, orphaned by an evil man, set out to take revenge for their father's murders. They are forced to navigate a complex web of deceit and stolen identities before they can reach their goal.

title: Maharaja
desc: Prince Kohinoor returns home and decides to defeat his parents' killer to save his people.

title: Maharaja
desc: Prince Kohinoor returns home after twenty years only to discover that Ranbir Singh, his parents' killer, still holds control. Subsequently, he decides to defeat him to protect his loved ones.

title: Parivaar
desc: A girl is abandoned by her relatives, but a street performer comes to her aid.

title: Parivaar
desc: When a young girl is thrown out of her home by her evil relatives, she finds shelter with a poor street performer and his two children, a dog and a monkey.

title: Laadla
desc: Raju can do anything at his mom's behest, even if it means giving in to a rude heiress.

title: Laadla
desc: Raju, an upright union leader, can do anything at his wheelchair-bound mother's behest, even if it means breaking his own heart and giving in to a rude heiress.

title: Krishna
desc: Sunil's life takes a tragic turn when he is convicted for a crime he did not commit.

title: Krishna
desc: The life of Sunil, an aspiring pilot, takes a disastrous turn when he is falsely convicted for a crime he did not commit.

title: Ghatak
desc: When Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise a colony in Mumbai, he decides to strike back.

title: Ghatak
desc: For his father's treatment, Kashi and his father move into a colony on the outskirts of Mumbai. But when Kashi sees a local gangster terrorise the colony, he decides to strike back.

title: Ghayal
desc: Ajay takes a unique route in his quest to avenge his brother's murder.

title: Ghayal
desc: Balwant Rai, a corrupt businessman, frames Ajay for the murder of his brother. Later, with no support from those close to him, Ajay takes an unlikely route to seek revenge.

title: Gunda Gardi
desc: Kalicharan, a ruthless gang leader, terrorises the city. To stop his reign, Police Commissioner Karan Singh is assigned the mission to bring him down.

title: Sanam
desc: Amid the grim shadows of terrorism, love guides an army man and a village belle towards each other.

title: Sanam
desc: Gaurav, unloved by his family, joins the army after Narendra's death. He hopes to honor his brother's memory and finally win the respect of his distant father.

title: Divya Shakti
desc: A reporter bears witness to a murder case, but in the process, his family gets threatened.

title: Divya Shakti
desc: A corrupt cop, a newspaper editor who glosses over mob activities, and a young reporter striving to tell the truth all combine in this explosive tale.

title: King Uncle
desc: Ashok, an austere man, finds new purpose in his dull life when he meets an oprhan girl.

title: Sandwich
desc: Sher Singh struggles to manage time between his two wives living in the same city.

title: Teri Meherbaniyan
desc: A young man incurs the wrath of a corrupt leader when he helps the people of his village.

title: Phool Aur Kaante
desc: Love leads Ajay to take charge of his father's criminal empire.

title: Karan Arjun
desc: Two brothers are murdered by their uncle while seeking justice for their father's death.

title: Insaaf: The Final Justice
desc: When a witness is killed, a police officer embarks on a mission to catch the culprit.

title: Vanvaas
desc: Deepak, aging and forgetful, seeks his vanished family after Shimla to Benaras. Conmen harm him, but reformers expose organ trafficking and his memory returns.

title: Moksha Salvation
desc: Vikram and Ritika plan to rob a bank to fund their business of providing free legal services to impoverished people. However, things get complicated when she is found dead.

title: Baazi
desc: An upright officer is wrongly accused of murder while probing a sensitive case. Escaping prison, he disguises himself as a woman to expose the truth and bring justice.
